data.content:
Plan review approval, 2026-04-25

Reviewed the interactive approvals UI plan. The plan is feasible and correctly preserves the existing human-owned Escalations view while adding an Approvals tab backed by c30f primitives. Test strategy covers tab regression, approval rows, lifecycle actions, and unsupported/manual states. Approved for implementation, with the existing blocker still meaningful: implementation should wait for or consume c30f approval-event plumbing rather than inventing a separate store.
